title: Fix 'image trust' from PR1899
body:
continue PR #1899 Support podman image trust command
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mtrmac PTAL, given you requested most of these changes
@QiWang19 Looks like we are returning different values then before in the tests.
